title: Bolsius - Set of 18 Scented Tealight Candles - Apple Cinnamon - Burning Time: 4 Hours - Home Decoration - Natural Extracts - with Natural Vegan Wax, Pomme Cannelle
features: The sales package contains 18 scented tealights lasting about 4 hours
Made in the EU. " With natural extracts With natural vegan wax Without palm oil Without animal fat Pure fragrance experience"

Bolsius produces quality candles since 1870 and uses only the best and most natural raw materials. Each Bolsius candle is made in Europe with craftsmanship and sustainably produced. Made with natural vegan wax and zero palm oil, with love for people and the planet. Bolsius scented candles use recyclable glass and will not drip or leak. The cotton wick is woven so that your candle always burns with a stable flame. All fragrances have been developed in collaboration with French essence houses to ensure the best fragrance experience in the comfort of your home.
description: Product Description Choose your favorite fragrance from the True Scents collection by Bolsius. True Scents combines iconic fragrances with natural extracts. Made with love for people and the planet. With natural vegan wax and zero palm oil or animal fat. Experience the pure fragrance experience of these trendy fragrances and modern classics from the comfort of your home! Safety Warning Always put the candles in a suitable stand with sufficient ventilation. Do not put them in direct sunlight and keep candles away from combustible materials. You can use a candle shutter to avoid splashing. Did you know that your nose can get used to a certain fragrance and that you can no longer smell it yourself over time? It is therefore a good idea to regularly change fragrances in your home so you can continue to enjoy them to the fullest.

specifications_table.Occasion: Baptism, Housewarming, New Year, Reception, Wedding
